failures.description: The agent made an invalid tool invocation by calling ProductCatalogSearch with missing and incorrectly typed arguments.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The required identifiers were already available at index 1: item_id "2177997696" and product_id "1968349452". At index 2, the Researcher produced malformed ProductCatalogSearch arguments: {"product_id": 0}, omitting item_id and using the wrong type/value for product_id. The tool then explicitly rejected this at index 3 with SchemaError: it requires string product_id and item_id.
